# Architecture — The Approach (v0.2.3)
*Generated by tech-lead-review · 2026-05-20*

## Data and Token Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph Agent["Claude Agent (Cowork session)"]
        AR[approach_run\none call · ~2KB out]
        AGS[approach_get_skill\nsection: intake → research\n→ schema → render → rules\n~50–80 lines each]
        WEB[Web research\nWebSearch batches\nconcurrent · 9+ queries]
        ASSEMBLE[Assemble APPROACH_DATA\nJSON object ~5–10KB]
        AGT[approach_get_template\n1 call · sends ~10KB JSON]
        WRITE[Write file tool\napproach-brief.html]
        CA[create_artifact\nhtml_path + mcp_tools]
    end

    subgraph Worker["Cloudflare Worker · mcp.missionbuilt.io"]
        SKILL_MD["SKILL.md bundle\n457 lines"]
        TMPL["approach-template.html bundle\n~150KB filled on inject"]
        INJECT["approach_get_template handler\n1. </script> escape\n2. replacer function inject\n3. return filled HTML"]
    end

    subgraph Cowork["Cowork Artifact Runtime"]
        RENDER["Client renderer\nVanilla JS · renderMasthead\nrenderTOC · renderSections\nrenderMeddpicc · renderColophon"]
        FONTS["Font loader\ncowork.callMcpTool\nwarmup_get_fonts"]
        LS["localStorage\nwarmup-fonts-v2\ncached after first load"]
        EXPORT["Export function\nbakes APPROACH_DATA\ninto standalone HTML"]
    end

    subgraph External["External"]
        GFONTS["Google Fonts CDN\nfallback for non-Cowork\n(blocked by Cowork CSP)"]
        LOADOUT_FONTS["warmup_get_fonts\nMCP tool · font CSS\n~50KB · one-time per device"]
        INTERNET["Public web\nSEC · LinkedIn · Bloomberg\nCompany sites · X/Twitter"]
    end

    AR -->|workflow instructions| AGS
    AGS -->|reads section from SKILL_MD| SKILL_MD
    Agent --> WEB
    WEB --> INTERNET
    WEB -->|intel gathered| ASSEMBLE
    ASSEMBLE --> AGT
    AGT --> INJECT
    INJECT -->|filled HTML ~150KB| WRITE
    WRITE --> CA
    CA --> RENDER

    RENDER -->|on open: cache miss| FONTS
    FONTS --> LOADOUT_FONTS
    LOADOUT_FONTS -->|font CSS| LS
    LS -->|cache hit: skip MCP call| RENDER
    RENDER -->|non-Cowork fallback| GFONTS

    RENDER --> EXPORT

    style AR fill:#f3ecdc,stroke:#8a2017
    style AGS fill:#f3ecdc,stroke:#8a2017
    style AGT fill:#f3ecdc,stroke:#8a2017
    style INJECT fill:#ede5d2,stroke:#5f6e26
    style SKILL_MD fill:#ede5d2,stroke:#c8bea7
    style TMPL fill:#ede5d2,stroke:#c8bea7
    style RENDER fill:#dfe3c4,stroke:#5f6e26
    style FONTS fill:#dfe3c4,stroke:#c8bea7
    style LS fill:#dfe3c4,stroke:#c8bea7
```

## Token Cost Annotations

| Step | Tokens in | Tokens out | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `approach_run` | ~50 | ~600 | One-time workflow prime |
| `approach_get_skill` × 4–5 | ~100 each | ~500–800 each | Section-gated — loads only what's needed |
| Web research (9+ batches) | ~200/query | ~500/result | Concurrent; most expensive phase |
| `approach_get_template` | ~10K (JSON) | ~150K (HTML) | Largest single response; one call, no retries |
| `create_artifact` | ~200 | ~100 | Metadata only |
| `warmup_get_fonts` (first open) | ~50 | ~50K (CSS) | Cached — subsequent opens: 0 |

## Design Notes

**Single-path render.** Unlike The Warmup (Path A/B based on engine version), The Approach always runs the full flow: data assembly → injection → artifact creation. The right call for a skill that generates a fresh brief per prospect — no stale-cache risk, no version-check overhead.

**Server-side injection pattern.** `approach_get_template` does both safety layers on the server (</script> escaping + replacer function) and returns the complete, self-contained HTML. The agent is a passive courier — it assembles the data object, hands it to the server, and writes the result. The server owns injection safety.

**Font sharing across skills.** The Approach shares the `warmup-fonts-v2` localStorage key with The Warmup and The Spotter. Any skill that loads fonts first covers the others. A user who runs the Warmup daily never pays the font MCP call when opening an Approach brief.

**Known issues (see TECH-LEAD-REVIEW-APPROACH.md for fix plan):**
- Schema mismatches: `pull.quote`, `facts.label/value`, `opener.text/beat`, `meta.generatedAt`, `meta.sourceCount` all documented incorrectly vs. what the renderer reads.
- `renderColophon` reads `C.seller` (undefined); should be `C.config.seller`.
- Question item chips are documented but not rendered.
```
